meaning: n.朗诵,背诵,叙述,背诵的东西
examples: They like to brag about how good their recitation is, and how good questions they're getting in the recitation section.
If you don't make it to class, contact your TA, your recitation instructor, and you can take makeup within a week of the time of the original test.
Constant practice has such an effect on memory as to lead to skillful performance on the piano, to recitation of a poem, and even to reading and understanding these words.
The recitation of facts is too basic for real scientists and too relentless for casual learners.
Tomoyori practiced daily, spending between 9, 000 and 10, 000 hours total memorizing before his recitation.
